title: Rocket Lab Awarded $30M Contract for HASTE Hypersonic Rocket
text: Rocket Lab has been awarded a significant contract by a major defense technology company for multiple hypersonic test flights using its HASTE launch vehicle. The contract value totals $30 million and includes three dedicated HASTE hypersonic test launches scheduled from Launch Complex 2 in Virginia. This contract award reflects the growing demand for Rocket Lab's specialized hypersonic testing capabilities within the U.S. defense and aerospace sector. The launches are expected to support advanced weapons development and testing programs critical to national security interests.
